CommandCenter.title: Command Center
CommandCenter.subtitle: One screen to see what is happening, which issue is at risk, how the brand appears in AI, and what actions need to be taken.
CommandCenter.narrativeTitle: Active Issue: Delivery complaints becoming trust problem
CommandCenter.narrativeDesc: There are 126 findings from TikTok, Reddit, local news, Gemini, and Perplexity pointing to the same issue.
CommandCenter.narrativeRuleTitle: View this as one case, not many dashboards
CommandCenter.narrativeRuleDesc: The same issue appears in Signals, Alerts, AI Visibility, Action Plans, Reports, and Team Feedback.
CommandCenter.alertDesc: Risk is rising 84%. Recommended response window: 6 hours. Reason: issue is moving fast, sources are strong enough, sentiment is negative, and competitors appear more often in AI answers.
CommandCenter.geoCardTitle: In AI answers, brand is less visible
CommandCenter.geoCardDesc: Brand appears 42%, while competitor appears 61%. Recommendation: create a neutral comparison explainer page and strengthen official sources.
CommandCenter.recDesc: PR response, content strategy, and crisis steps are combined into one work plan with owner, channel, deadline, and legal review.

DataSources.title: Multi-Source Intelligence Coverage
DataSources.description: Connect monitored resources, run ingestion, and verify which sources feed the narrative signal pipeline.
DataSources.connectedDesc: Run ingestion to collect raw documents and create signals for AI analysis.
DataSources.noSourcesDesc: Add a source or adjust your filter to start ingestion.

Signals.title: Signals Intelligence
Signals.subtitle: Triage raw signals and convert high-confidence analysis into action.
Signals.tableDesc: Monitor incoming signals, select a row to inspect context and recommendation.
Signals.loadingDetail: Loading signal detail and AI analysis...
Signals.noAnalysis: AI summary is not available yet. The raw scraped content is still shown in full below.

Visibility.title: GEO / AI Visibility
Visibility.subtitle: Track how answer engines mention Narriv, cite owned assets, and position competitors across strategic prompts.
Visibility.emptyDesc: We are currently gathering data from AI search engines to measure your brand's narrative presence. Please check back later.
Visibility.scoreDesc: Composite score from brand mentions, citation quality, competitor displacement, and prompt coverage.
Visibility.competitorDesc: Competitors appear more frequently in AI answers for crisis-management and monitoring prompts.
Visibility.geoDesc: Recommendations generated from weak prompt coverage and competitor-dominant answers.
Visibility.visibilityGapAction: Create action plan from visibility gap
Visibility.footer: Backend implication: ai_visibility_results, prompt test runs, source citations, competitor mention tracking, and GEO actions must feed back into the same Action Engine and reporting model.

ActionPlans.title: Structured Action Recommendation Engine
ActionPlans.subtitle: Convert verified intelligence into PR, content, influencer, and crisis response workflows with explicit feedback controls.
ActionPlans.emptyDesc: Action plans are generated automatically when a high-severity narrative is detected. Currently, no plans are required.
ActionPlans.fallbackNarrative: Narrative: delivery reliability narrative spreading across TikTok, forums, and regional news. Sentiment is negative and volume velocity is 2.4x baseline.
ActionPlans.fallbackEvidence: Evidence: 1,248 signals · 6 source types · 92% confidence · 84% escalation probability
ActionPlans.feedbackDesc: Every recommendation must train the system through accept, edit, or reject signals.
ActionPlans.reason: Wrong tone, missing source, weak risk ranking, wrong action type...
ActionPlans.saved: Feedback is saved to recommendation_feedback and used by prompt scoring improvement.
ActionPlans.footer: Design rule: recommendations are not magic AI cards. Each output needs evidence, action category, rationale, owner, approval state, execution handoff, and measurable feedback outcome.

Alerts.title: Predictive Alerts + Learning Loop
Alerts.subtitle: Alert escalation is predicted before spikes, then human decisions are captured to improve recommendation prompts and scoring.
Alerts.demoNotice: Demo data - connect backend to see live alerts
Alerts.scoringDesc: Prompt score delta after team feedback on recommendation quality, source fit, and action usefulness.

flowSteps.recommendDesc: AI proposes action from narrative evidence.
flowSteps.feedbackDesc: Accept, edit, reject, and explain why.

Alerts.footer: Design rule: predictive alerts need explainable drivers: velocity, source authority, sentiment skew, narrative spread, time-to-impact, and confidence. Learning loop needs explicit feedback taxonomy.

Intelligence.title: Intelligence Clusters
Intelligence.subtitle: Understand narrative themes, stakeholders, impact, and emerging risk clusters.
Intelligence.mapDesc: 19 active clusters generated from 428 signals across monitored sources
Intelligence.dominant: Dominant narrative: accountability over technical reliability
Intelligence.dominantDesc: Signals increasingly connect outage timing, leadership transparency, and enterprise customer trust. The cluster is likely to feed alerts if media citations increase.
Intelligence.clusterTitle: Accountability narrative is expanding beyond outage complaints
Intelligence.clusterDesc: This cluster links customer trust, leadership disclosure timing, and regulatory attention. News citations are the strongest acceleration factor.
Intelligence.focusDesc: Prepare leadership response themes and monitor regulator-linked stakeholders for escalation.

Reports.title: Narrative Intelligence Reports
Reports.description: Prepare stakeholder-ready report packages from signals, issue clusters, GEO visibility, alerts, and action feedback.
Reports.emptyDesc: Reports will be compiled based on your monitored narratives and alert history. Check back later when enough data is collected.
Reports.queueDesc: Track readiness, missing inputs, and export status for stakeholder reports.
Reports.noMatchDesc: Try another search term or status filter.
Reports.distributionDesc: Bundle executive PDF, email summary, appendix evidence, and action-owner notes.
Reports.exportReadinessDesc: Phase 9 frontend is ready for backend reporting endpoints. Until then, export actions remain safe demo interactions.
Reports.backendContractDesc: GET /api/reports, report export job status, and signed download URL when available.

Sidebar.demoDesc: Frontend preview uses mock data. Backend integration coming soon.

AlertDetail.demoDetail: This demo detail view explains why the alert matters and what the Action Engine should generate next.
AlertDetail.routeTo: Route this alert to {owner} and create a structured action plan with accept/edit/reject feedback.

activity.title: Activity Timeline
activity.description: Dummy activity feed aligned with the dashboard activity card in the Pencil reference.

items.item1: AI generated a response recommendation for Alert #204
items.item2: New trust narrative cluster detected across Reddit and News
items.item3: GEO audit found competitor-dominant answer coverage
items.item4: Learning loop accepted 8 new recommendation feedback signals

cases.title: Narrative Cases
cases.description: Demo case list for grouping alerts, actions, owners, and learning-loop outcomes.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: All integrations render from dummy data for the Vercel stakeholder preview.

settings.title: Demo Workspace Settings
settings.description: Preview-only workspace profile and deployment readiness notes.

readinessItems.item3: Data comes from central mock module
readinessItems.item4: API client scaffold preserved for later integration
